name: Military RP V3.1
description:
⚠️PROXY STRONGLY RECOMMENDED ⚠️

A Roleplay Bot That Allows You To Live Out All Your Military Fantasies!
Wanna Be A Marine In The Pacific Theater Of WW2? Done!
Wanna Be A Poor Old Conscript In Hanoi In The Vietnam War? You Can!
Wanna Be A Futuristic Space Marine On The Moon In 2167? Go Ahead!

Just Like That One Person Said That One Time: "I Think, Therefore, I AM"

(Img cred)

(Discord Here)

(EDIT: I Never Expected This Bot To Explode Like It Did, Thanks A Million To All Of You Who've Commented And Interacted With My Bot)
(EDIT 2: Bot's sitting at 750ish chats rn, i think i might explode)
(EDIT 3: 24k Chats, how many more of these can i do to express my gratitude?)
(EDIT 4: 26k chats, honestly y'all are the best, have a meme)

(EDIT 5: i look away for one fucking minute at we're at 33k messages and 1k chats, y'all are the fucking best)
(EDIT 6: 1,272 CHATS @ 41.6K MESSAGES???? Y'ALL ARE THE BEST!!! i was gonna wait for 50k, but fuck it, y'all get a overhaul and update for this. i love y'all consensually <3)
(EDIT 7: We did it. 50k messages. i have nothing else to say, except thanks)

(EDIT 8: 12.7k Chats, with 380k messages. This will forever be my most popular bot, and now that I've hit 50 followers, i'm giving it some more love)

(EDIT 9: 13.6k chats with 406k Messages, this bot was whipped up originally in like 20 minutes 😭 thank you all sm)

(EDIT 10: 16.6k chats, with 502.5k messages. Even with the hit proxy's have taken, this bot is still going strong. I still can't believe it lmfao)

(EDIT 11: 25.2k chats with 781.7k messages. If y'all get ts to a million I'm doing a meat reveal ong. Also I added lore summaries for ARMA, DayZ and CoD (both Black Ops and Modern Warfare)

(EDIT 12: 30.3k chats with 967.9k. If y'all get this to a million before I hit 200 followers i'm dropping the discord server early. Crazy thing is i never intended for this bot to get this big 😭)

(EDIT 13: 35.3k chats with 1.2 Million messages, its all over the walls i won't lie. Added the Napoleonic Wars and the Chechen wars. Have fun y'all)

(EDIT 14: Huge thanks to MisterTwister for the lore book)
